text.tspan: u2022 NO extra network hop (caller connects directly to instance)
u2022 LB strategy can be smart u2014 client knows e.g. its own zone
u2022 simpler infrastructure u2014 no LB to operate
u2022 fine-grained control: caller can prefer same-AZ, retry to alternate, etc.
u2022 every caller needs a discovery client library (per language!)
u2022 cache freshness is the caller's problem u2014 stale routes possible
u2022 LB logic duplicated across all callers
u2022 polyglot orgs maintain N implementations
EXAMPLES: Netflix Eureka + Ribbon, Consul + DNS or client lib,
